message: I am looking to buy. I am willing to pay a fair price to reach an agreement.
Hello B1. I'm ready to trade. Given my costs, I'm looking for a price around 85. Let me know what your range is, and let's secure steady trades for all 20 rounds.
Your bid of 8 is too low for me to break even. I can drop my ask to 45. Please raise your bid significantly so we can find a fair midpoint and both profit for the remaining 19 rounds.
My valuation is low, so I cannot bid anywhere near 45. I need a much lower price to make a deal work. Could you consider an ask closer to 5?
You bid 17 last round, so 5 is unrealistic. Let's be practical. I will ask 18 from now on. Please bid 18 or higher to guarantee we both profit every single round.
My valuation is exactly 17, so at 18 I lose money and won't trade. Since you asked 15 last round, let's keep trading at 15. I will bid 15; please ask 15 so we both profit.
If you ask 15, I will bid 15. That guarantees us both a profit every round. If you ask higher than 17, I cannot trade without losing money.
I accept 15. I will ask exactly 15 every round from now on. Please continue to bid 15 so we can both secure consistent, guaranteed profits for the remaining 17 rounds.
Our agreement is working perfectly! I will continue asking exactly 15 for every remaining round to guarantee we both profit consistently. Please keep bidding exactly 15.
Sounds great! The agreement at 15 works perfectly for me too. I will continue to bid exactly 15 every round so we both secure guaranteed profits for the remaining 16 rounds. Let's keep this up.
